\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5604 introduces Theta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{\bm{n}}(t)=\hat{\bm{n}}(\Theta(t),\Phi(t)), \end{equation}
